# Tests currently expected to pass under tests/tls on mri.
# CI fails if any of these stops passing (regression).
# Add lines as we fix more; remove with reason in commit msg.
# Sorted alphabetically. Refresh with bin/refresh-testkit-baseline tls (running on mri).
